onboarding.slide1_desc: Take picture and tell us the wahala so we fit know the sickness.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Our AI go check and tell you the crop sickness within seconds.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Get cheap solutions and tips to protect your harvest.

dashboard.hero_desc: Check your crop sickness early so you fit protect your harvest.
dashboard.describe_placeholder: Tell us wetin you dey see...
dashboard.early_detection_desc: If you dey check your leaf regular, you fit save up to 80% of your harvest.
dashboard.sync_offline: E go sync automatically when you get network.

weather.title: Advice Based on Weather
weather.advice: Maize crops fit catch leaf blight quick when place dey wet.
weather.highlight: Check am well well this week.

scan.title: Check Leaf
scan.placeholder: e.g., the leaf dey yellow with brown spots...
scan.char_limit_error: Talk small more, at least 5 letters
scan.tip_colors: Talk about how the color change
scan.tip_parts: Talk about the leaf, stem or fruit where e affect
scan.tip_time: Talk when you first see the wahala
scan.camera_req_desc: Allow us use your camera make we fit check your crop for sickness.
scan.capture_error: E no fit take picture. Try again or take am from phone.

result.title: Wetin We Find
result.based_on_image: Na the picture where you take we use check am.
result.others: Other things where e fit be:
result.prevention_tips: How to Stop Am Next Time
result.empty_title: We No See Wetin Dey Happen
result.empty_desc: We no fit identify the wahala well. Abeg take clearer picture or talk more about wetin happen.
result.analysis_error: E no fit check am. Abeg try again.
result.generic_error: Wahala happen when we dey check the scan.
result.error_tips:
• Take clearer picture with good light
• Make sure the leaf show well
• Include the part where dey okay and the part where sick
• Talk wetin you dey see

analyzing.desc: Our AI dey check your leaf well well

settings.title: Settings
settings.made_with: We do am with 💚 for Nigerian Farmers
settings.update_msg: You dey use the latest one.
settings.error_logout: E no fit comot. Try again.
settings.error_signout_all: E no fit comot for all devices. Try again.
settings.lang_description: Choose the language where you wan use for CropWatch.

auth.sign_in_desc: Enter make you fit check your crops again and see wetin AI talk.
auth.unexpected_error: Wahala happen where we no expect.
auth.register_desc: Join CropWatch make you start to protect your harvest

success.title: Account Don Open
success.desc: We don open your account. You fit enter now make you start to check your crops and see wetin AI talk.

forgot.title: You Forget Password?
forgot.desc: Put your email and we go send you link make you set new password.
forgot.check_email_desc: We don send link to {{email}}. Abeg check your email and click the link to set new password.

language_screen.title: Choose Language
language_screen.subtitle: Choose the language where you wan use
language_screen.pidgin_desc: Wetin you go yarn for farm

permissions.title: Camera Access
permissions.camera_desc: Take pictures of your crop leaves

modals.logout_message: Are you sure say you wan comot for your account?
modals.deactivate_message: This one go delete all your data and you no fit get am back. You sure?
modals.sign_out_all_message: This one go comot your account for all the phones where e dey.

tips_screen.title: Farming Tips
tips_screen.empty_subtext: Try search another thing or change wetin you select to find advice.

tips.tip1_desc: Too much water fit spoil the root. Pour water only when the top sand don dry.
tips.tip2_title: Change crop where you dey plant
tips.tip2_desc: Change crop every year make the sand no weak and to chase pests away.
tips.tip2_rel: E dey very important for big harvest
tips.tip3_desc: Check your leaves every week make you fit see if color change or pest enter.
tips.tip4_desc: Plant marigold near your tomatoes to naturally chase nematodes and other pests.
tips.tip5_desc: Put organic mulch make e hold water and balance the soil hotness.
tips.tip6_desc: Harvest early morning when water still dey inside so e go last longer.
